consent.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and measure our traffic. You can accept or decline.

footer.backing: Trips are operated by Blisniuk & Amanov, a registered travel agency in Argentina (EVyT File No. 20943).

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hi! I'd love to receive information about The Wine Trips journeys.
whatsapp.experienceMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the {{region}} trip. Could you tell me more?
whatsapp.tripMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the {{region}} trip ({{dates}}). Could you tell me more?

waitlist.title: Join Our Waiting List
waitlist.eyebrow: Be first to know about exclusive wine experiences
waitlist.body: We're curating extremely limited vacancies for our most exclusive wine journeys. Join our waiting list to be notified of launches in your preferred regions.
waitlist.consent: I agree to receive email updates from TheWineTrips and consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the privacy policy. I can unsubscribe at any time.
waitlist.successBody: We've added you to our priority list.
waitlist.invalidBody: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please email us at info@thewinetrips.com

itinerary.title: Download the itinerary
itinerary.subtitle: Verify your email and we'll send you the full day-by-day itinerary.
itinerary.name: Full name
itinerary.consent: I agree to receive email updates from TheWineTrips and consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the privacy policy.
itinerary.verifySubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to unlock your itinerary.
itinerary.resend: Didn't get it? Use a different email
itinerary.fallbackBody: We've emailed you. Here is your itinerary in the meantime.
itinerary.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid name and email address.
itinerary.invalidCode: Please enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
itinerary.errorBody: Please try again or email us at info@thewinetrips.com

access.title: Insider Access
access.description: Direct access through our local partners and a registered travel operator, opening doors that are hard to reach on your own.

groups.title: Small Groups
groups.description: Limited to 4-8 guests to ensure genuine immersion, intimate tastings, and no crowds.

curation.title: Thoughtful Curation
curation.description: Expertly balanced itineraries featuring legendary appellations alongside hidden local gems.

execution.title: Seamless Execution
execution.description: From boutique luxury hotels to Michelin-starred dining, every detail is handled with precision.

culture.title: Cultural Integration
culture.description: Great wine deserves context. Experience the region's art, history, and gastronomy holistically.

guidance.title: Founder-Led
guidance.description: Led by founders alongside trusted local sommeliers and estate insiders who share their knowledge and passion for the terroir.

home.backingBody: The Wine Trips journeys are operated by Blisniuk & Amanov, a travel agency registered in Argentina (EVyT File No. 20943). Small groups, direct human contact, and a licensed operator behind every booking.

experiences.title: Curated Collections
experiences.subtitle: Discover meticulously curated journeys to the world's most celebrated wine regions. Each experience offers exclusive access, expert guidance, and unforgettable moments.
experiences.elsewhereSub: We are available to discuss custom requirements for private groups and corporate retreats.

contact.title: The Waiting List
contact.subtitle: Our journeys are intimate by design. Join the list to secure priority access to upcoming allocations.
contact.meetExpertsSub: Prefer to speak with someone? Schedule a complimentary consultation to discuss your specific requirements.

trip.ctaBody: Tell us a little about your group and we'll walk you through every detail.
trip.comingSoonBody: We're finalising the details of this journey. Join the list and you'll be the first to know when it opens.
